title: /Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/.claude 内容を表示せよ
summary_text: **Findings** - **High**: `FUGUE unavailable => BLOCKED` is currently inconsistent with existing fallback language. [AGENTS.md](/Users/masayuki/AGENTS.md#L36) allows replacing missing `Claude` lane; [~/.claude/AGENTS.md](/Users/masayuki/.claude/AGENTS.md#L38) also says `Rate limit -> auto fallback`. - **High**: `KERNEL.md` will not be loaded unless load order is changed. Current loaders only mention `AGENTS.md` and adapter files: [~/.claude/AGENTS.md](/Users/masayuki/.claude/AGENTS.md#L5), [~/.claude/CLAUDE.md](/Users/masayuki/.claude/CLAUDE.md#L6). - **Medium**: Policy precedence is ambiguous across roots. [AGENTS.md](/Users/masayuki/AGENTS.md#L79) says `/Users/masayuki/AGENTS.md` is canonical, while [~/.claude/CLAUDE.md](/Users/masayuki/.claude/CLAUDE.md#L3) says primary source is `~/.claude/AGENTS.md`. - **Medium**: Path-placement risk if `KERNEL.md` is added at `/Users/masayuki/*` root level; current rule forbids new root-level project files: [AGENTS.md](/Users/masayuki/AGENTS.md#L3). - **Medium**: Trigger semantics are underspecified (`"explicitly names Kernel"`). No rule for mixed mentions (`Kernel` and `FUGUE` together), aliases (`/kernel`), or default route when neither is named. - **Low**: Drift risk is high unless mirrored updates are enforced across duplicated policy surfaces: [AGENTS.md](/Users/masayuki/AGENTS.md#L82). **Recommended wording changes** 1. Add a **Domain Routing Gate** section to [AGENTS.md](/Users/masayuki/AGENTS.md): ```md ## Domain Routing Gate - If user explicitly says `Kernel` or `/kernel`, load `KERNEL.md`. - If user explicitly says `FUGUE` or `/fugue`, load `FUGUE.md`. - If both are present, do not merge defaults; return `BLOCKED` until user selects one. - If neither is present, follow baseline AGENTS routing. - `FUGUE` and `Kernel` are never auto-substituted for each other. ``` 2. Add a **FUGUE Availability Gate** exception to resolve fallback conflict: ```md ## FUGUE Availability Gate - `FUGUE` execution requires an active Claude lane. - If Claude is unavailable in current run (`rate limit|timeout|outage|auth` with actual CLI error), mark `BLOCKED`. - In this case, do not auto-fallback to `Kernel`; require explicit user reroute to `Kernel`. - Baseline model fallback applies to adjudication lanes, not to replacing the FUGUE control plane. ``` 3. Update load order in [~/.claude/AGENTS.md](/Users/masayuki/.claude/AGENTS.md) and [~/.claude/CLAUDE.md](/Users/masayuki/.claude/CLAUDE.md): ```md Load order: 1) Project-local AGENTS.md 2) Domain policy (KERNEL.md or FUGUE.md when explicitly selected) 3) Provider adapter (CLAUDE.md/CODEX.md) 4) ~/.claude/AGENTS.md ``` 4. Fix canonical-source ambiguity with one explicit sentence in [~/.claude/CLAUDE.md](/Users/masayuki/.claude/CLAUDE.md): ```md When conflicting with /Users/masayuki/AGENTS.md, /Users/masayuki/AGENTS.md wins. ``` 5. Place domain files outside root project area, e.g. `~/.claude/policies/KERNEL.md` and `~/.claude/policies/FUGUE.md`, and reference those paths explicitly from loaders.
